Luigi's Trattoria - Dinner Menu

Starters
Garlic Bread - Toasted baguette slices loaded with garlic butter and fresh parsley.

Mains
Spaghetti Bolognese - Traditional slow-cooked ground beef in a rich tomato and onion sauce, served over fresh spaghetti and topped with aged parmesan.
Chicken Parmigiana - Breaded chicken breast topped with marinara sauce and melted mozzarella cheese. Served with a side of fries.
